home.heroSubtitle: Play-based bilingual preschool in Panama City. Opening 2026.
home.valuesTitle: We Connect. We Create. We Grow. We Play.
home.valuesText: We believe children learn best when they feel safe, curious, and free to explore. Our approach combines structured play with natural discovery.
home.ctaText: Reach out on WhatsApp and we'll answer all your questions.

programs.title: Designed for every stage.
programs.subtitle: Each program respects your child's natural pace of development.

team.title: Meet the Queen Bees.
team.teachersIntro: Every teacher at BusyBees is chosen not just for their training, but for their warmth and passion for early education.

admissions.step3Desc: Complete the application form and submit the required documents.
admissions.step4Desc: Your child is part of the hive.

metadata.homeTitle: Busy Bees Learning Center — Bilingual Preschool in Panama
metadata.homeDescription: Play-based bilingual preschool in Panama City. Small groups, dedicated teachers, natural English immersion. Opening 2026.
metadata.aboutDescription: Learn the story behind BusyBees, two teachers with a dream of creating the best preschool in Panama.
metadata.programsDescription: Four age-based programs: Baby Bees, Little Bees, Busy Bees, and Queen Bees. Each respects your child's natural pace.
metadata.teamDescription: Meet the founders and teachers of BusyBees Learning Center.
metadata.galleryDescription: Daily life moments at BusyBees Learning Center.
metadata.admissionsDescription: Admissions process, required documents, and payment methods for BusyBees Learning Center.
metadata.blogDescription: Articles about early education, parenting, and life at BusyBees.
metadata.contactDescription: Contact us via WhatsApp, email, or fill out our form. We're here to help.
